about.title: About the Academy
about.subtitle: International Public Organization «International Academy of Cossackdom» (IPO «IAC»)
about.missionText: To unite intellectual, scientific, and spiritual potential for the development of Ukrainian statehood, science, education, culture, Cossack traditions, and international cooperation, and to foster a society founded on knowledge, honor, responsibility, and service to Ukraine.
about.visionText: To be a recognized international academic and public institution that shapes a new generation of leaders, supports scientific research, promotes civil society, strengthens international ties, and popularizes Ukrainian Cossackdom worldwide.
about.value6: freedom, democracy, and the rule of law
about.value9: support for youth, education, and science
about.value10: preservation of the historical and cultural heritage of Ukrainian Cossackdom
about.activity1: development of science, education, and innovation
about.activity2: support for scientific research and invention
about.activity3: holding international congresses, forums, conferences, and seminars
about.activity4: development of Ukrainian Cossackdom and national-patriotic education
about.activity5: international cooperation with academies, universities, and public organizations
about.activity6: support for veterans, military personnel, volunteers, and youth
about.activity7: implementation of humanitarian, educational, cultural, and social projects
about.structureText: The Academy structure includes the Presidium, regional and international representations, scientific departments, institutes, expert councils, specialized commissions, and other structural units operating in accordance with the Charter.
about.membershipText: Citizens of Ukraine and other countries who support the Academy's goals and principles and actively participate in its activities may become members. Individual, collective, and honorary membership are provided, as well as corresponding member and academician statuses.
about.internationalText: The Academy actively develops cooperation with international organizations, universities, research institutions, diplomatic missions, and public associations, promoting joint educational, scientific, humanitarian, and cultural programs.
about.mottoText: «Science. Honor. Cossack Spirit. Service to Ukraine and Humanity.»

privacy.title: מדיניות פרטיות
privacy.intro: מדיניות זו מתארת כיצד האקדמיה הבינלאומית לקוזאקים אוספת, משתמשת ומגינה על הנתונים האישיים שלכם.
privacy.dataText: אנו עשויים לאסוף שם, פרטי קשר, עיר, מדינה ומידע שאתם מספקים בבקשת ההצטרפות.
privacy.purposeText: הנתונים משמשים לבדיקת בקשות, יצירת קשר ועדכון על פעילות האקדמיה.
privacy.storageText: הנתונים נשמרים למשך הזמן הנדרש לצורך עיבוד ועל פי החוק.
privacy.rightsText: יש לכם זכות לגישה, תיקון, מחיקה ולביטול הסכמה. צרו קשר דרך פרטי הקשר באתר.

footer.copyright: © האקדמיה הבינלאומית לקוזאקים. כל הזכויות שמורות.
